ogTitle: Strathfield vs Strathfield South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Strathfield and Strathfield South.
heading: Strathfield vs Strathfield South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Strathfield, New South Wales and Strathfield South, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Strathfield South has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Strathfield (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Strathfield or Strathfield South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Strathfield has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Strathfield South scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Strathfield scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Strathfield South scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Strathfield or Strathfield South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Strathfield South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
